_meta.notes: Patterns aggregated from public DPs. Each entry includes the trigger, observed outcome, and prevention. Confidence is based on number of corroborating reports.

patterns.name: RAT (Risk Assessment Team) shutdown
trigger: Closing multiple Sapphire-family cards rapidly to chase SUBs
Heavy MS pattern within 1-3 months of new account
BT or large cash advance immediately after open
patterns.outcome: All Chase relationships closed simultaneously, including checking, savings, and points clawback if SUB recently earned. Reinstatement rare.
patterns.prevention: Stay under 1 Chase product per 30 days. Avoid closing SUB-earned cards under 12 months. Keep organic-looking spend on new accounts.

patterns.name: Financial Review
trigger: Single transaction >$10K on a card with limited history
Multiple new Amex cards in <30 days with rapid spend ramp
Mismatched income on application vs reported income
patterns.outcome: Cards locked pending submission of bank statements / tax returns / paystubs (4506-C). If review fails, all Amex products closed and points forfeited.
patterns.prevention: Build account history before large transactions. Honest income reporting. Don't open 3+ Amex cards in a single month.

patterns.name: Relationship review (closure)
patterns.outcome: Future Amex applications denied. Existing accounts may stay open but flagged.

patterns.name: Rapid-application shutdown
patterns.trigger: 3+ Citi cards in <30 days, often combined with bank-bonus chasing on Citi checking
patterns.outcome: All Citi cards closed plus existing Citi banking products.
patterns.prevention: Honor 8/65/95 rules with margin. Don't open Citi banking and credit simultaneously.

patterns.name: Aggressive churn shutdown
patterns.trigger: Pattern of opening Aviator Red, hitting first-purchase SUB, closing within 90 days
patterns.outcome: Future Barclays denials. Some users blacklisted.
patterns.notes: Barclays Aviator Red SUB triggers on first purchase, not full MSR. Tempting to close immediately; they notice.

patterns.name: Auto-decline pattern
patterns.trigger: Income-to-debt mismatch, recent 3-bureau pulls, sub-prime credit history
patterns.prevention: Apply when newest line of credit is ≥3 months old.

general_velocity_thresholds.chase_safe: ≤1 Chase app per 30 days, ≤4 Chase apps per 12 months
general_velocity_thresholds.chase_risky: ≥2 Chase apps per 30 days OR ≥5 per 6 months
general_velocity_thresholds.all_issuers_safe: ≤4 apps total per 30 days, ≤8 per 90 days
